SUBJECT: Approval needed: <%= agentName %> wants to take an action
INTRO: An AI agent has queued an action and needs your approval before it runs.
BODY: Click below to review the action arguments, originating context, and approve or reject it. The link signs you into your FastComments account directly.
FALLBACK_LINK: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this URL into your browser: <%= reviewUrl %>
